negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_120
prompt: The video opens with a static shot of an open wardrobe, displaying a variety of neatly hung clothes on wooden hangers. On the left, a vibrant red shirt stands out prominently. To its right, three more shirts in shades of blue, pink, and white are hung side by side in that order. The wardrobe features light-colored doors with sleek black handles, and the interior is clean and minimalistic. A black robotic arm is positioned in the foreground, partially obscuring the view of the wardrobe. As the video progresses, the camera slowly pans to the left, revealing the robotic arm in action. The right wardrobe door begins to close gradually, eventually concealing the clothes and the interior of the wardrobe. The final frame captures the partially closed wardrobe doors, with the robotic arm still in the foreground.
